savings.title: My Savings

savings.emptyGoalsHint: Tap Manage → New goal to create one.
savings.completeText1: If you confirm completing "{name}", this goal will no longer appear in the active list.
savings.completeText2: Its transactions will still be available in the history. If you want to permanently delete everything related to it, use the delete option.
savings.deleteText1: Deleting the goal "{name}" will permanently remove everything related to it, including its transaction history.
savings.deleteText2: If you just want the goal to stop showing without losing its history, cancel this action and mark it as completed.

voice.title: Voice Assistant
voice.speakPrompt: Say something like: "Create an expense of 43€ today of category Food"
voice.notSupported: Your browser doesn't natively support speech recognition. Don't worry! You can write your command below:
voice.fallbackPlaceholder: Write your command here... (e.g. expense of 45€ food today)
voice.parsingError: Could not parse the text. Please make sure to specify at least the amount (e.g. 43€).
